summary_results.headline: A highly respected and successful Chief Executive within the healthcare sector
summary_results.about:
A highly respected and successful Chief Executive within the healthcare sector with a proven track record of driving innovative, strategic and complex change management outcomes. Demonstrating strong inclusive leadership, effectively engaging a diverse range of stakeholders to deliver positive organisational, people and financial results. An authentic values-driven leader, passionate about healthcare and committed to fostering collaborative environments for sustainable success.

Key Skill Set:
	Situational & Participative Leadership
	People-centred Culture & Mentorship
	Collaboration & Communication
	Decisive Decision Making
	Strategic & Innovative Thinking
	Continuous Improvement & Business Development
	Corporate Governance & Risk Management
	Strong Financial Acumen
	High Emotional Intelligence & Empathy
	Operational Excellence

summary_results.headline: CEO | Non Executive Director | Strategist | Creator | Transformer | Achiever |
summary_results.about:
Jayne is a highly collaborative and innovative leader who's vision is to fundamentally improve community health with a goal of providing unprecedented levels of care and service to local communities.

Jayne excels in developing strategies and leading complex teams to deliver a service-oriented, high performance, award-winning work culture. She is a diverse and innovative thinker as well as rational leader who can quickly assess risks, opportunities to be decisive and proactive.

Many clients present to IPC Health clinics with non-medical issues that affect their health and wellbeing. To address this, Jayne commenced the groundwork for IPC Health to provide a free Social Prescribing program in the Brimbank and Wyndham communities, in partnership with the North Western Melbourne Primary Health Network (NWMPHN), Brimbank and Wyndham City Councils. Social Prescribing provides supportive community-based programs aimed at improving health, social connections, overall wellbeing and quality of life.

With a diverse industry background, having now worked in the health sector, higher education and advertising, Jayne often draws on her experience in these industries to find creative solutions to problems that arise. This has resulted in the development of strategies that translate well into operations, while ensuring business success and sustainability.

Not one to sit still, Jayne is a passionate ice hockey player and finds this provides the perfect balance to her CEO role.

summary_results.headline: Senior Associate, Class Actions, Shine Lawyers
summary_results.about:
Senior Associate | Class Actions Litigation

An accomplished solicitor with litigation experience across all jurisdictions in Australia.  Recognised for expertise in class actions, with particular experience in financial services matters including managing large litigation disputes against Australia's largest banks and wealth management businesses.   A leader amongst colleagues, adept at guiding teams to success while maintaining a client-centric approach, and committed to securing the best results for my clients.

summary_results.headline: Managing Director at  Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration
summary_results.about:
Suzanne is a focused, ambitious and highly adaptable business leader with a strong commercial and management background, gained from a range of entrepreneurial and senior executive roles in Australia, South Korea and Spain. 

With 14 years experience as a company director across 3 continents, Suzanne has demonstrable success in creating new business, managing change, developing and driving expansion programs through the development of high performance teams and the creation of mutually beneficial strategic alliances.  Suzanne has a proven track record of dramatically improving revenue and profits across a diverse range of cultural and industry platforms with significant experience in a start up environment in the Australian and South Korean markets. 

Her experience to date has spanned the Sales & Marketing, Water, Energy, Telecommunications and Banking & Finance industries.
summary_results.company_name: Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration

company.name: Melton Dental House
locations: 6 O'Neills Rd, Melton, 3337, au

results.headline: A highly respected and successful Chief Executive within the healthcare sector

experience.title: Chief Executive Officer
experience.summary:
Responsibilities

•	Strategic leadership and management
•	Financial and budget planning, reporting and accountability, including facilities and support services
•	Risk management: development and implementation of strategic risk management, including clinical risk
•	Representation, engagement and stakeholder management

Achievements

•	Led the development and establishment of the Company’s first (and second) three-year strategic plans
•	Successfully drove the complex transition of four disparate Faculty clinics to MTHC (during COVID years) on time and with ‘minimal disruption’
•	Forged a strategic partnership with Faculty to drive outcomes on behalf of the University
•	Key involvement in major complex change projects (clinic transitions, Practice Management System transitions, Enterprise Agreement union negotiation and implementation)
•	Budget results last four years: -0.8% to +2.5% (2024 break-even budget $18M)
•	Establishment of the Company’s first Strategic Risk Management Plan with quarterly reporting to the Board’s Finance, Audit & Risk Management Committee
•	Coaching and mentoring of a high-performing diverse leadership team
•	Instrumental in cultivating a values culture across the organisation
•	Full accreditation (with no areas of non-compliance) of relevant clinics with appropriate industry body

experience.title: Managing Director
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Reporting directly to the President GC Asia with a GC Australasia team of 32.
•	Lead for all strategic, leadership, sales, business development, financial and operational activities.
•	Corporate governance and compliance.
•	Regulatory Affairs and Quality Assurance.
•	Dealer / distributor management and contract management.
•	Stakeholder management; both internal and external.
•	Quarterly reporting to the GC Asia (Singapore) and GC International AG (Switzerland) Boards.
•	Presentations for GC Asia President for biannual Global Meetings (Japan and Switzerland).
•	Preparation of ad hoc reports for GC Asia and GCIAG.
•	TQM activities.

Achievements:

•	Increased sales revenue in a mature market by 11%.
•	Increased market share penetration by 22% within key product categories.
•	Improved Employee Satisfaction Survey participation rate to 76% 
•	Improved Employee Satisfaction to 94%
•	Appointed Business Process Expert GC Asia for Global Project Team SAP introduction.

experience.title: President & Managing Director GC Asia Dental Singapore
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Reported directly to the Executive Vice-President GCIAG.
•	Direct management for a team of 100 across the Asia region. 
•	Operational responsibility for 3 regions (Australasia, Southeast Asia, India & South Asia).
•	Management oversight of the Singapore Head Office.
•	Regional strategy development and execution.
•	Financial management for the region.
•	Sales, Marketing and Business Development lead for the Asia region. 
•	Acting Regional General Manager for Southeast Asia from 2013.
•	Acting Managing Director for GC Australasia from 2015.
•	Corporate governance / compliance / Regulatory Affairs / Quality Assurance.
•	Dealer / distributor management and contract negotiation.
•	Stakeholder management; both internal and external.
•	Preparation and presentation at biannual Global Meetings (Japan and Switzerland).
•	Quarterly on-site reporting to the GCIAG Board.

Achievements:

•	Increased sales by 80% despite the Global Financial Crisis.
•	Increased profit by 40% during tenure.
•	Increased headcount by 75% and accelerated investments to fuel the growth.
•	Increased market share by 12% from 2012 to 2016.
•	Improved the Employee Satisfaction Survey result to 92% with a participation rate of 91%.
•	GC Asia Region Project Lead for successful IT Infrastructure investment and implementation.
•	Project Lead for design, fit out and relocation to new purpose-built office on time and on budget.

experience.title: General Manager & Director of Clinical Services
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Reported to the Chief Executive Officer.
•	Managed 8 direct reports.
•	Overall responsibility for >200 employees with an annual budget of $26M.
•	Key member of the Executive Management Team.
•	Financial management, corporate governance and compliance.
•	Monthly Board Report preparation.
•	Maintain Safety and Quality standards (clinical governance).
•	Created a culture of staff engagement, development and empowerment.

Achievements:

•	Restructured the Practices’ Senior Management Team.
•	Achieved 144% over budget revenue performance.
•	Realised 30% cost savings in the 1st year through effective supplier negotiation.
•	Saved the company $1.25M p.a. by changing the company’s traditional risk-based service mix.
•	Operated the Dental Practices 5% below the cost per patient compared to private practice.
•	Improved the company culture and significantly reduced turnover and absenteeism.
•	Achieved the group's highest engagement scores (13% higher than rest of the ahm organisation).
•	Introduced Mentor Program for Dentists and Traineeships for support staff.
•	Proposed and successfully established 1st new Practice in over 10 years.

experience.title: Clinical Consultant ahm Dental & Eyecare Practices
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Reported to General Manager Dental & Eyecare Practices.
•	Project Manager Leader for the Minimal Intervention Dentistry Pilot.
•	Evaluated ways to implement a risk assessment approach to disease management in order to:
-	Deliver best clinical outcomes, satisfaction and value for patients
-	Promote greater staff performance and satisfaction
-	Optimise resources and value for ahm.

Achievements:

•	Project Manager Leader for Minimal Intervention (MI) Dentistry Pilot (12 month pilot).
•	Produced and presented Board Report documenting the outcomes of the project.
•	Development and execution of roll-out plan to all staff (200).
•	The Project outcomes delivered 4.3% year on year savings in equivalent Private Practice fees. 
•	Recorded a 90% client recommendation rate from MI clients.
•	62% of patients felt strongly that MI provided incentive to remain with the fund.
•	64% of patients felt strongly that MI provided additional value for money from their health cover.

experience.title: Director of Clinical Services ahm Dental & Eyecare Practices
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Senior Management Team member reporting to the General Manager Dental & Eyecare Practices.
•	Management of 8 direct reports and >60 professional clinicians.
•	Leader for all administration and clinical functions.
•	Strategic Business Development planning.
•	Preparation and presentation of monthly Board Report.
•	“Efficiency & Effectiveness” Project Leader (internal analysis for Annual Board Strategy Meeting).
•	EQuIP (Evaluation & Quality Improvement Program). 

Achievements:

•	Successful roll out of 2 electronic patient management systems (training / pre-post evaluation).
•	Initial accreditation of the Dental & Eyecare Practices and ongoing successful re-accreditation.
•	Prompt and effective response to approximate 30% increase in patient throughput.

experience.title: Director of Dental Services
experience.summary:
Responsibilities:

•	Voluntary role reported to Chief Medical Officer SOCOG.
•	Direct reports: 89 volunteers for the Olympics and 32 for the Paralympics.
•	Completed extensive dental and clinical training.
•	Senior Administrator for all Dental Services.
•	Project Management – Olympic Games coverage.
•	Data analysis and report generation.
•	Communication to the Olympic team.
•	Custodian of Sydney 2000 Dental Service patient database.

Achievements:

•	Personal oversight of design, fit out and decommissioning of the 4-surgery dental clinic.
•	Training for all staff (120) before and during both Games.
•	Clinic operated from 9am to 10pm every day; 100 patients seen on the busiest day.
•	1,604 patients seen in 54 days, 6,516 services, 4.06 services per patient.
•	35% of patient encounters required interpreter services.
•	Zero incidents or adverse events.
•	The only health service within the Polyclinic that was 100% digital.
experience.company_name: SOCOG: Sydney Organising Committee for the Olympic Games

results.headline: CEO | Non Executive Director | Strategist | Creator | Transformer | Achiever |

experience.title: Chief Executive Officer
experience.summary:
CEO of IPC Health, one of the largest providers of community health services in Victoria. It operates from six sites in Melbourne’s West and employs 580 staff. 

Leading a consortium of community health organisations to provide the DHHS with Rapid Response Mobile Testing teams. These teams are providing urgent health services on the front line, containing COVID-19 outbreaks and protecting communities across Victoria.

Commenced the groundwork for IPC Health to pilot a free Social Prescribing program in the Brimbank community, in partnership with the North Western Melbourne Primary Health Network (NWMPHN) and Brimbank City Council.

experience.title: Chief Strategy, Business Development and Communications
experience.summary: Strategy; Leadership; Business Development; Strategic and Operational Planning; Organisational Change; Marketing Strategy & Communications;

experience.title: Faculty Executive Director
experience.summary: Strategy; Organisational Change; Creative Leadership; Strategic and Operational Planning; Governance; Marketing Strategy & Communications; Project Management

experience.title: Associate Director, Faculty Services
experience.summary: Strategy; Organisational Change; Creative Leadership; Strategic and Operational Planning; Governance; Marketing Strategy & Communications; Project Management

profile.headline: CEO | Non Executive Director | Strategist | Creator | Transformer | Achiever |

company.name: Comm Unity Plus Services Ltd (commUnity+)
company.overview:
Comm Unity Plus Services Ltd (commUnity+) started in October 1982 as a small residents action group and Citizen’s Advice Bureau on the site of the Deer Park Neighbourhood House.

Over forty years we have grown to develop new programs in response to community needs. commUnity+ is now a 
multi-disciplinary community agency that provides services focused on early intervention to promote social and economic inclusion, social justice, and safety from family violence.

We provide a range of services to diverse and vulnerable communities experiencing disadvantage and marginalisation across the West and North Metropolitan regions of Victoria.

profile.location: Millers Point, New South Wales, Australia

results.headline: Senior Associate, Class Actions, Shine Lawyers

experience.title: Associate
experience.summary: Specialising in financial services class actions (superannuation, insurance, financial advice) against some of Australia's largest financial institutions.

experience.title: Contract Lawyer
experience.summary: As a member of the Financial Markets Litigation team I worked with Barclays Bank UK plc, acting for them in a number of claims arising from the mis-selling of consumer finance products. The role involved personal carriage of a large caseload from the commencement of the claim right through to settlement or trial. This involved the review of evidence, defence drafting, negotiation, instructing counsel, case research, and pre-trial applications.

experience.title: Contract Lawyer
experience.summary: I worked on a remediation project for the Royal Bank of Scotland. Other contract lawyers and I assisted the Bank in dealing with a wide range of complaints and disputes arising from alleged historical treatment of SME customers. The work involved dealing with complex financial products, providing advice on consents and privilege, assessment of risk and compliance, evidence review, and the production of outcome letters for each complaint. The nature of the matters were complex, required an attention to detail and a sound understanding of financial concepts.

experience.title: Senior Associate
experience.summary:
GTC Lawyers is a National Law firm with multiple offices in New South Wales, Queensland, Victoria and Western Australia. From July 2017 I was promoted to Senior Associate and Office Manager of the George Street office in Brisbane, Queensland. My practise areas included Criminal, Commercial and Family Law. 

At GTC Lawyers I worked as a solicitor-advocate, appearing daily in the local and higher courts , of Queensland, or the Federal Circuit Court of Australia. Those appearances ranged from sentencing hearings, bail applications, summary trials and interlocutory hearings. I am an adept advocate, with proven results and client testimonials. At any one time I managed 50 to 70 files. As an office manager my other duties involved management of three junior solicitors and two paralegals.

experience.title: Solicitor
experience.summary: Practise Areas: Commercial and civil litigation; and Criminal Law.

experience.title: Supervisor
experience.summary:
- Management of staff
- Customer Service
- Settling accounts, compliance and control
- Opening and closing duties

experience.title: Call Centre- Lead Generator
experience.summary:
Australian Property Directions, now 'Complete Lending' are a private Australia-wide finance and property group. Primarily sourcing it's sales online and over the phone, Australian Property Directions provided comprehensive and specialised property and financial services.

Responsibilities:
- Lead Generation through cold calling
- Sales pitching and negotiation
- Contact of new and existing clients
- Establishment of customer details through cold calling
- Sales Referrals

experience.title: Head Coach
experience.summary:
Head coach of the junior school swimming team and assistant coach of the senior school swimming team.

Responsibilities:
- Coaching, Training and Mentoring
- Supervision and management of children
- Problem solving and dispute resolution

results.about:
Senior Associate | Class Actions Litigation

An accomplished solicitor with litigation experience across all jurisdictions in Australia.  Recognised for expertise in class actions, with particular experience in financial services matters including managing large litigation disputes against Australia's largest banks and wealth management businesses.   A leader amongst colleagues, adept at guiding teams to success while maintaining a client-centric approach, and committed to securing the best results for my clients.

profile.headline: Senior Associate, Class Actions, Shine Lawyers

company.name: Shine Lawyers
company.overview:
At Shine, we don't judge you or where you came from.

What we do care about is where you’re going and how we can help get you there. We are here to empower you to support our clients as they stand up in the face of injustice.

We’ve built a place for you to...

Connect and be you
Join a team of authentic people who care as much as you do about standing up for the little guy, doggedly seeking justice, and advancing the law. You’ll work with supportive experienced leaders who are invested in you. And you’ll be visible and valued for who you are and what you bring.

Challenge and be challenged
At Shine, you’ll dare to be different, questioning and challenging the status quo. That’s how we stay ahead of the pack – for our clients, for better justice and for your remarkable career.

Achieve and grow
Here, you’ll find a powerful platform for success, from our proven operating models to our award-winning Centre of Learning. You’ll discover the One Shine Way framework – your path to a career that means so much more. And you’ll be backed to seize opportunities, and trusted to deliver.

profile.summary:
Senior Associate | Class Actions Litigation

An accomplished solicitor with litigation experience across all jurisdictions in Australia.  Recognised for expertise in class actions, with particular experience in financial services matters including managing large litigation disputes against Australia's largest banks and wealth management businesses.   A leader amongst colleagues, adept at guiding teams to success while maintaining a client-centric approach, and committed to securing the best results for my clients.

experience.title: Associate
experience.summary: Specialising in financial services class actions (superannuation, insurance, financial advice) against some of Australia's largest financial institutions.

experience.title: Contract Lawyer
experience.summary: As a member of the Financial Markets Litigation team I worked with Barclays Bank UK plc, acting for them in a number of claims arising from the mis-selling of consumer finance products. The role involved personal carriage of a large caseload from the commencement of the claim right through to settlement or trial. This involved the review of evidence, defence drafting, negotiation, instructing counsel, case research, and pre-trial applications.

experience.title: Contract Lawyer
experience.summary: I worked on a remediation project for the Royal Bank of Scotland. Other contract lawyers and I assisted the Bank in dealing with a wide range of complaints and disputes arising from alleged historical treatment of SME customers. The work involved dealing with complex financial products, providing advice on consents and privilege, assessment of risk and compliance, evidence review, and the production of outcome letters for each complaint. The nature of the matters were complex, required an attention to detail and a sound understanding of financial concepts.

experience.title: Senior Associate
experience.summary:
GTC Lawyers is a National Law firm with multiple offices in New South Wales, Queensland, Victoria and Western Australia. From July 2017 I was promoted to Senior Associate and Office Manager of the George Street office in Brisbane, Queensland. My practise areas included Criminal, Commercial and Family Law. 

At GTC Lawyers I worked as a solicitor-advocate, appearing daily in the local and higher courts , of Queensland, or the Federal Circuit Court of Australia. Those appearances ranged from sentencing hearings, bail applications, summary trials and interlocutory hearings. I am an adept advocate, with proven results and client testimonials. At any one time I managed 50 to 70 files. As an office manager my other duties involved management of three junior solicitors and two paralegals.

experience.title: Solicitor
experience.summary: Practise Areas: Commercial and civil litigation; and Criminal Law.

experience.title: Supervisor
experience.summary:
- Management of staff
- Customer Service
- Settling accounts, compliance and control
- Opening and closing duties

experience.title: Call Centre- Lead Generator
experience.summary:
Australian Property Directions, now 'Complete Lending' are a private Australia-wide finance and property group. Primarily sourcing it's sales online and over the phone, Australian Property Directions provided comprehensive and specialised property and financial services.

Responsibilities:
- Lead Generation through cold calling
- Sales pitching and negotiation
- Contact of new and existing clients
- Establishment of customer details through cold calling
- Sales Referrals

experience.title: Head Coach
experience.summary:
Head coach of the junior school swimming team and assistant coach of the senior school swimming team.

Responsibilities:
- Coaching, Training and Mentoring
- Supervision and management of children
- Problem solving and dispute resolution

results.headline: Managing Director at  Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration

experience.title: Managing Director / Founder
experience.summary: Upgrade your homes water supply to premium water with Complete Home Filtration.
experience.company_name: Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration

experience.title: Director
experience.summary: Kingsway Bendigo Community Bank branch

experience.title: Senior Consultant
experience.summary: Having been recruited by PwC directly from my MBA at UWA, I was fortunate to work alongside a group of dynamic and intelligent individuals on a number of fascinating and challenging projects, spanning Energy, Health and Utilities.  With my utilisation over 90% whilst I was there, this time with PwC was well spent and was instrumental in helping bring together many learnings from my MBA which in turn lead to an approach by and subsequent employment as a Senior Manager at Bendigo Adelaide Bank.  Although only working with PwC for 6 months I would wholeheartedly recommend them as an employer and a great place to work.

experience.title: Director / Founder
experience.summary: Call a Cooler (Perth North) Pty. Ltd. was established during the corporate restructuring of the Call a Cooler business in Western Australia. CAC (Perth North) now owns the exclusive territory License for this area and subsequently controls the established rental business for the Perth North within this territory.

results.about:
Suzanne is a focused, ambitious and highly adaptable business leader with a strong commercial and management background, gained from a range of entrepreneurial and senior executive roles in Australia, South Korea and Spain. 

With 14 years experience as a company director across 3 continents, Suzanne has demonstrable success in creating new business, managing change, developing and driving expansion programs through the development of high performance teams and the creation of mutually beneficial strategic alliances.  Suzanne has a proven track record of dramatically improving revenue and profits across a diverse range of cultural and industry platforms with significant experience in a start up environment in the Australian and South Korean markets. 

Her experience to date has spanned the Sales & Marketing, Water, Energy, Telecommunications and Banking & Finance industries.
results.company_name: Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration

profile.headline: Managing Director at  Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration

company.name: Environmental Water Solutions t/a Complete Home Filtration
company.overview:
Environmental Water Solutions Pty Ltd. is the registered owner and founder of Complete Home Filtration since 2018

Complete Home Filtration specialises in the installation of whole of home water filtration systems ensuring clean, delicious water from every tap that is not only better for your health and pocket but better for your home and the environment too. Never pay for bottled water again and enjoy water that is kinder to your skin and hair and everything in the home that uses water, including your water using fixtures and appliances. 

Here at Complete Home Filtration, we love nice water.  Our friends call us water snobs! We can sniff out a glass of unfiltered tap water at 50 yards and so can our kids! We live and breathe good water and believe passionately that everyone should be drinking, showering and bathing in clean, freshly filtered, softened and chlorine free water, especially if you are a bottle fed baby, child or have specific health concerns like sensitive skin or asthma.
